name: OHA Investment Corporation
description: OHA Investment Corporation (OHAI) was a specialty finance company that operated as a business development company. It focused on providing creative direct lending solutions to middle-market private companies across various industry sectors. The company's primary objective was to provide its investors with current income and capital appreciation through a portfolio of investments, including leveraged loans, high-yield bonds, and other corporate structured products. OHA Investment Corporation was managed by Oak Hill Advisors, a prominent global credit-focused alternative asset manager, before it was eventually acquired and merged into another entity.
